name: Individuals
tagline: Best for solo creators, freelancers, and professionals.
features: Access to 20+ desktop & mobile apps (Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)
Adobe Creative Cloud Libraries for asset management
Standard customer support via email and chat

name: Business & Agencies
tagline: Perfect for small to medium creative agencies and teams.
features: 1 TB of secure cloud storage per user
Admin Console for easy license management & reassignment
Centralized billing and asset ownership controls
Integration with Slack, Microsoft Teams, and Jira
24/7 Premium technical support with dedicated experts

name: Enterprise Pro
tagline: Tailored for large organizations requiring advanced security.
features: Unlimited cloud storage with advanced asset pooling
Enterprise-grade security with Single Sign-On (SSO) & IdP integration
Corporate asset protection with strict sharing restrictions
Dedicated account manager & customized onboarding training
Unlimited 1-on-1 expert sessions for team members
